results.title: Tour de France: Defending champ retains overall lead
results.description: BERGERAC, France -- Belgian rider Tim Merlier won the eighth stage of the Tour de France in a sprint finish to claim back-to-back-stage victories, while defending champion Tadej Pogacar kept the race leader's yellow jersey on Saturday.

results.title: Russians attack bus and bus stop in Kherson: at least five injured – photo
results.description: Russian forces carried out two drone attacks targeting public transport in Kherson on the morning of 12 July. A bus and a bus stop came under attack, leaving civilians injured.

results.title: Farage popularity hits lowest since election as rival takes lead in polls
results.description: Nigel Farage's popularity has crashed to its lowest since the last election amid scrutiny of his finances as a new poll puts him on a devastating -27 rating.

results.description: Typhoon Bavi, the strongest storm to hit mainland China this year, brought heavy rains and strong winds after making landfall in Zhejiang.

results.title: Two killed as lorry rams into parked trucks at Kisii petrol station
results.description: According to an incident report, the Isuzu FVR lorry, which was ferrying cereals, crashed into eight lorries that had been parked at the petrol station.

results.description: Sixteen Indian tourists have been discharged from the hospital after surviving a tragic boat accident near Vietnam's Phu Quoc Island, which resulted in 15 fatalities.

results.title: Twisha death case: AIIMS-Delhi final report to CBI confirms skin tissue on gym belt
results.description: The final forensic report of AIIMS-Delhi in the Twisha Sharma death case has concluded that a gymnastics belt could have been used in the incident as it found the presence of the victim’s skin tissue on it, sources said.
